MP for Solihull West & Shirley

Local Help

  • Tweet

General Emergency Numbers:

Emergency Services (Police, Fire, Ambulance): 999 or 112

Non-emergency Police: 101

NHS (Medical Assistance): 111

National Power Cut Emergency: 105

Flooding: 0345 988 1188 (Environment Agency, for flood warnings)

British Transport Police: 0800 405040 (for emergencies on trains or at stations)

 

Energy Supply contacts

Electricity Supply Issues:

Western Power Distribution (Midlands): 0800 6783 105

Gas Supply Issues:

National Gas Emergency (Gas leaks or suspected issues): 0800 111 999

Cadent Gas (West Midlands): 0800 111 999

Water Supply Issues:

Severn Trent Water (Midlands): 0800 783 4444

 

Other Important Emergency Contacts:

Citizens Advice (General advice & support): 03444 111 444

The Samaritans (For emotional support): 116 123

British Red Cross (Emergency and humanitarian aid): 0344 871 11 11

British Gas Emergency (Faults or breakdowns): 0330 100 0303

Ofgem (Energy regulator for complaints): 020 7901 7000

Consumer Direct (Consumer Rights and Issues): 0808 223 1133

Age UK: 0800 678 1602

Solihull Community Housing: 0121 717 1515

Childline: 0800 1111

Join Neil’s email newsletter for updates on local news, his work in Parliament, and the decisions shaping our community.
